## Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Motivation

Why is this useful?

## Scope

- docs only
- demo UI
- bridge/runtime pattern
- security model
- provider adapter

## Security Considerations

Does this change affect:

- privilege boundaries
- auditability
- approval/OTP flow
- allowed commands

If yes, explain how.
